Once your account is deleted, all of its: Lapho i-akhawunti yakho isuswe, yonke imithombo yayo nedatha nayo izosuswa unomphela. Sicela uqinisekise ukuthi ungathanda ukususa i-akhawunti yakho unomphela.
Uma i-akhawunti yakho isisusiwe, zonke izinsiza zayo nedatha izosuswa unaphakade. Sicela ufake iphasiwedi yakho ukuze uqinisekise ukuthi ungathanda ukususa unomphela i-akhawunti yakho.
Please confirm access to your account by: Sicela uqinisekise ukufinyelela kwi-akhawunti yakho ngokufaka elinye lamakhodi wakho wokutholwa okuphuthumayo.
Please enter your new password below: Sicela ufake iphasiwedi yakho entsha ngezansi

Recovery codes let you regain access if: Amakhodi wokutakula akuvumela ukuthi uthole ukufinyelela uma ulahlekelwa yidivayisi yakho ye-2FA. Zigcine kumphathi wephasiwedi evikelekile.

When you enable two-factor authenticatio: Lapho unika amandla ukuqinisekiswa kwezici ezimbili, uzokwaziswa nge-PIN ephephile ngesikhathi sokungena ngemvume. Le phini ingatholwa kusuka kuhlelo lokusebenza olusekelwa nge-TOTP ocingweni lwakho.
